provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly character concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional aesthetic, lived-in sci-fi spacefaring crew, visible material texture and surface grain, visible brushstrokes, full body visible, front-facing relaxed standing pose, isolated on plain dark grey background, tall reptilian alien warrior wearing a Compact-style pressed regulation uniform jacket in steel-blue with stamped metal rank tabs, the jacket has straight rectangular lines and machine-made seams that completely contradict Veshan forged aesthetic, no house markings no crimson sash no honor tokens, the uniform fights against the natural scale ridges instead of following them
provenance.negative_prompt: photorealistic, photograph, photo, stock photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, octane render, unreal engine, anime, cartoon, chibi, bright saturated colors, clean pristine new clothing, glamorous, heroic pose, dynamic action pose, multiple characters, busy background, environmental background, landscape, text, watermark, blurry, low quality, extra limbs, deformed, medieval, fantasy armor, superhero

judgment.explanation: Same cross-faction material error. Veshan in Compact uniform.
